task: Analyze the provided TypeScript repository fixture and find the route/service origin for a user creation crash.

issue.title: POST /api/users crashes when email is omitted
issue.body: Creating a user through src/routes/user.ts fails with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'trim') at createUser (src/services/userService.ts:7:25). The health route is fine, and src/services/userService.test.ts is only a passing unit test.

comments.body: The crash happens after the route delegates to createUser; inspect the service implementation before changing route wiring.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded source files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search source symbols in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: read_node_context
tools.description: Read bounded source context for an exact candidate node.
